name: spectyra
description: Route OpenClaw through Spectyra's local companion for token optimization on every spectyra/* LLM call: chat, agents, cron/tasks, skills, and tool-using runs. Requires a Spectyra account and API key. No agent code changes required.
author: Spectyra

models.name: Spectyra Smart
models.description: Best balance of quality and cost — routes to your configured provider with live optimization

models.name: Spectyra Fast
models.description: Lowest latency and cost — aggressive optimization for routine tasks

models.name: Spectyra Quality
models.description: Highest quality — minimal optimization, premium model routing

models.name: Spectyra · OpenAI · smart
models.description: Routes through Spectyra to OpenAI — pick for GPT workflows while keeping optimization

models.name: Spectyra · OpenAI · fast
models.description: OpenAI fast lane through Spectyra (lower cost / latency)

models.name: Spectyra · Anthropic · smart
models.description: Routes through Spectyra to Anthropic — coding and Claude-heavy tasks

models.name: Spectyra · Anthropic · quality
models.description: Anthropic quality lane — reviews, Opus-class models when configured
